metadata.name: Proxmox VM (QEMU)
metadata.description: Creates a Proxmox virtual machine from a cloud-init-ready template with configurable clone, CPU, memory, disk, networking, and guest settings.

items.name: resource_name
items.title: Resource Name
items.description: Terraform resource name (alphanumeric and underscores only)

items.name: vm_name
items.title: Proxmox VM name
items.description: Name of the VM.

items.name: vm_id
items.title: Proxmox VMID
items.description: Value used for the vm identity settings.

items.name: description
items.title: VM description
items.description: Description for the VM.

items.name: tags
items.title: Tags
items.description: Comma-separated Proxmox tags

items.name: target_node
items.title: Target Node
items.description: Proxmox node that will host the VM.

items.name: clone_template
items.title: Template
items.description: Source template name to clone

items.name: full_clone
items.title: Full Clone
items.description: Create a full clone instead of a linked clone

items.name: onboot
items.title: Auto Start
items.description: Start the VM automatically with the node.

items.name: startup
items.title: Startup
items.description: Proxmox startup order and delay string

items.name: automatic_reboot
items.title: Auto Reboot
items.description: Allow provider-triggered automatic reboot on change

items.name: ci_user
items.title: Cloud-init user
items.description: Username for the cloud init.

items.name: ssh_key
items.title: SSH Key
items.description: SSH public key passed to cloud-init

items.name: ipconfig0
items.title: Network Config
items.description: Cloud-init network config for the first NIC

items.name: nameserver
items.title: Nameserver
items.description: DNS server for guest cloud-init config

items.name: cpu_cores
items.title: CPU Cores
items.description: Number of CPU cores

items.name: cpu_sockets
items.title: CPU Sockets
items.description: Number of CPU sockets

items.name: cpu_type
items.title: Proxmox CPU type
items.description: CPU type to use in Proxmox.

items.name: memory_mb
items.title: Memory
items.description: Memory allocation in MB

items.name: bios
items.title: VM BIOS type
items.description: BIOS type for the VM.

items.name: qemu_os
items.title: QEMU OS type
items.description: Guest OS type for QEMU.

items.name: bridge
items.title: Bridge
items.description: Proxmox bridge for the first NIC

items.name: network_model
items.title: NIC model
items.description: Network adapter model.

items.name: disk_storage
items.title: Disk Storage
items.description: Storage pool for the main disk

items.name: cloudinit_storage
items.title: Cloud-init Storage
items.description: Storage pool for the cloud-init disk

items.name: disk_size_gb
items.title: Disk Size
items.description: Main disk size in GB

items.name: disk_iothread
items.title: IO Thread
items.description: Enable IO thread for the main disk

items.name: disk_replicate
items.title: Disk Replication
items.description: Enable disk replication flag
